text:
Created attachment 197447
[PATCH] lang/coffeescript: update to 2.3.2

portlint pratty much OK, but I got one warning from testport (2 lines):

pkg-static: DEVELOPER_MODE: Notice: arch "FreeBSD:11:amd64" -- no architecture specific files found:
**** could this package use a wildcard architecture?

any specific QA that I am missing for this one? TY.
